body.content:
Dear Ezgi,


Please note that if you only amend Free time exception or Notes in commodity & route ,  but nothing else changed in the agreement, system will identify it as ‘Amended Data does not exist’.

To solve this issue, please try to extend 1 more day for ‘duration to Date’. Then you could save and request again.Thanks!


How to extend 'duration to date':


1.	
	Click Duration button
2.	
	Select service scope - AEU
3.	
	Extend 1 day
4.	
	Save and request





Joanne Ding / 丁佳莹

Digital & IT Department

Mobile: +86-13417033072

E-mail: joanneding@culines.com <mail

Web: www.culines.com <http://www.culines.com> 







发送时间: 2026年3月10日 18:55
收件人: Joanne
